top_signals.title: DCC Gets Sweetened Takeover Bid From KKR, ECP
top_signals.summary: KKR & Co. and Energy Capital Partners have sweetened their bid for DCC Plc to more than £5.7 billion ($7.6 billion) and bought extra time to complete what has become a drawn-out takeover process.

top_signals.title: How to cut the cost of your holiday this summer with Complete Savings
top_signals.summary: Global pressure on fuel prices, rising holiday costs and food prices in the UK projected to rise by 50 per cent since start of the cost of living crisis – these are just some of the daily hurdles households are facing this summer. However, with school holidays fast approaching many families still want to travel [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
